drills.title: Advantage Read: Paint Touch Kickout or Finish
drills.description: Create a paint touch and make the second read: finish if rim protection stays home or spray out when low help commits.
drills.purpose: Train fast second-read decisions after creating a downhill advantage.
drills.court_area: Top to slot into paint; weak-side corner and wing as pass targets.
constraints: Live dribble only until decision.
Decision must occur before stopping in the paint.
No jump-pass across body.
scoring: 1 point for correct read + on-time pass/finish.
0 points for late pick-up or missed open teammate.
Target 8/10 reps.
common_mistakes: Predetermining the finish before reading low help.
Leaving feet before pass window is clear.
Driving into a teammate's spacing window.
progression: Add a rotating third defender from the nail.
Limit to one gather in the paint.
Start from different entries (slot, pistol, drag).
regression: Use guided shell help (coach points to help side).
Start 2-on-1 from wing with fixed low help.
Allow a pause-and-freeze read before action.
coaching_cues: See low help by your second dribble.
Stay on balance to pass or finish.
Throw to the receiver's shooting pocket.
success_metrics: Eight correct reads in ten reps.
Decision made before paint stop.
Two or fewer late pickups per set.

drills.title: Pick-and-Roll Second Read: Pocket, Skip, or Keep
drills.description: Read the low-man tag and weak-side stunt out of a ball screen, then choose pocket pass, skip, or keep to finish.
drills.purpose: Sharpen second-side processing in pick-and-roll without predetermining the pass.
drills.court_area: Middle or slot ball screen with weak-side corner spacer.
constraints: Must use shoulder-to-hip screen setup.
No pass unless both feet are under control.
Tag read callout required after each rep.
scoring: 1 point correct decision, +1 point if pass arrives on time.
-1 for turnover or airborne decision.
Team target: +10 net points.
common_mistakes: Missing the low-man early tag.
Staring at roller and never checking weak side.
Picking up dribble too early.
progression: Randomize coverage (drop, weak, switch late).
Add short-roll connector option.
Shot clock starts at 8 seconds.
regression: Start in scripted drop only.
Remove weak-side stunt defender.
Coach gives pre-rep cue on likely tag location.
coaching_cues: Read tag before you leave the floor.
Keep dribble alive until window opens.
success_metrics: Seven on-time passes in ten live reads.
Two or fewer deflections/turnovers.
Correct tag identification after each rep.

drills.title: Transition Advantage 3-on-2: Rim, One-More, or Pullout
drills.description: Run repeated 3-on-2 transition advantages and read the backpedaling defender to score at rim, make one-more pass, or pull out into organized offense.
drills.purpose: Improve advantage conversion and decision quality in early offense.
drills.court_area: Full court into front-court 3-on-2 lane spacing.
constraints: Ball must cross half court in under 3 seconds.
Wide lanes must stay filled until decision.
No early dribble retreat unless defender takes away both lanes.
scoring: 2 points for paint finish or assisted corner three.
1 point for correct pullout when break is dead.
-1 for charge, travel, or forced pass.
common_mistakes: Narrow lane running that shrinks passing windows.
Throwing advance pass too late.
Ignoring trailer balance when advantage is gone.
progression: Add recovering third defender from behind.
Require weak-hand finish/pass.
Start possessions from live rebound outlet.
regression: Begin from half court 3-on-2 setups.
Use guided defender angle cues.
Allow one stop-and-reset if spacing collapses.
coaching_cues: Sprint wide first, then show hands.
Pass early when teammate is ahead.
Flatten to corner if rim is loaded.
success_metrics: Correct score/pass/pullout on eight of ten reps.
First advance pass before half court when open.
Lane spacing maintained through decision.

drills.title: Closeout Attack Read: Contain, Cut Off, or Peel
drills.description: Close out under control, then read first attack step to contain no-middle, cut off baseline, or peel to the helper.
drills.purpose: Link closeout technique to live attack reads and legal contests.
drills.court_area: Slot and wing catch points with live driver and helper behind play.
constraints: No leaving feet on initial closeout.
Top foot must shade middle unless call changes.
Contain decision within first two slides.
scoring: 1 point for legal contest + contain angle.
1 point for correct peel communication.
-1 for middle blow-by or shooting foul.
common_mistakes: Overrunning closeout and opening middle lane.
Crossing feet on first slide.
Late or silent peel switch call.
progression: Add shot fake into second drive.
Add corner lift to force help decisions.
Shorten clock to 6 seconds per rep.
regression: Start from static catch and one-direction drive.
Use cone checkpoints for closeout distance.
Coach-controlled attack direction.
success_metrics: Middle drive allowed on fewer than two of ten reps.
Eight legal contests in ten reps.
Recovery stance rebuilt within one step.

drills.title: Low-Man Tag and Recover
drills.description: Play low-man help on ball-screen actions: tag roller early, recover on pass-out, and finish with a high-hand contest.
drills.purpose: Build reliable low-man timing and communication in rotation defense.
drills.court_area: Weak-side lane line, dunker spot, and opposite corner.
constraints: Tag call must be verbal and early.
Body tag before reaching with hands.
Recover to shooter under control, no fly-by.
scoring: 1 point for early tag + clean recover.
1 bonus for forced non-paint finish.
-1 for open roller layup or corner breakdown.
common_mistakes: Tagging too late from below the level of the ball.
Ball watching and losing corner shooter.
Long closeout with poor balance.
progression: Add skip-pass threat from handler.
Rotate x-out behind the low man.
Begin from transition into flow PNR.
regression: Walk-through shell with freeze checks.
Fixed corner spacing before live pass-outs.
Short reps with coach-triggered pass timing.
coaching_cues: Tag body first, then find your matchup.
success_metrics: Correct tag/stunt on eight of ten reps.
Catch-to-contest under two seconds.
Help call on every rep.

drills.title: Off-Ball Lift/Drift Relocation
drills.description: Relocate with drive direction: drift on baseline penetration, lift on middle drive, and stay shot-ready on catch.
drills.purpose: Improve off-ball spacing reads that create clean kickout windows.
drills.court_area: Corners, slot, and wing around live drive lanes.
constraints: Relocation starts when driver gains shoulder advantage.
No two players in same relocation window.
Arrive with feet set before catch.
scoring: 1 point for correct drift/lift read.
1 point for shot-ready catch.
-1 for spacing collision or late relocation.
common_mistakes: Watching the ball and relocating late.
Drifting on middle drive (wrong read).
Catching with narrow base.
progression: Add second helper to force extra relocation.
Add one-more pass requirement before shot.
Randomize drive origin and pace.
regression: Use guided baseline-only then middle-only reps.
Start with walk-through timing counts.
Spot-mark relocation targets with cones.
coaching_cues: Drift on baseline, lift on middle.
success_metrics: Correct relocation on eight of ten reads.
Feet set before catch on seven of ten reps.
No shared spacing windows.

drills.title: Late-Clock Quick Decision (6-to-0)
drills.description: Start with 6 seconds and force an immediate read: attack gap, create a quick two-man action, or get to a clean end-of-clock shot.
drills.purpose: Train tempo, shot quality, and communication under shot-clock pressure.
drills.court_area: Top/slot into two-side action with weak-side spacer.
constraints: Must initiate action by 5 seconds.
No holding the ball below 3 seconds without an advantage.
Final attempt must be on balance.
scoring: 2 points for paint touch to quality shot.
1 point for low-turnover late-clock creation.
-1 for violation or contested bailout.
common_mistakes: Starting action too late.
Over-dribbling into crowded gaps.
Ignoring best spacer on weak side.
progression: Add switching defender to second action.
Alternate primary initiator each rep.
Shorten to 5-to-0 clock.
regression: Start at 8 seconds with scripted first action.
Remove weak-side stunt defender.
Coach calls initial trigger action.
success_metrics: Quality shot created on seven of ten reps.
One or fewer violations per set.
Decision initiated before 5 seconds on nine of ten reps.

drills.title: Tracking Alias Cleanup Review Workflow
drills.description: Run a deterministic workflow linking tracking review, alias assignment checks, and correction logging before using downstream decision artifacts.
drills.purpose: Reduce identity noise so practice recommendations tie to stable local player aliases.
drills.court_area: Film room / workflow station (no court action).
constraints: Use local artifacts only; no inferred real identity claims.
Log each alias merge/split reason.
Re-run affected views after cleanup.
scoring: Pass when all flagged alias conflicts are resolved.
Fail when unresolved conflicts remain open.
Target: zero HIGH-priority alias review items.
common_mistakes: Closing review item without documenting change.
Merging aliases from weak evidence.
Not verifying downstream drill/report updates.
progression: Add peer verification on high-impact merges.
Require before/after export snapshots.
Add project-level cleanup checklist.
regression: Handle only HIGH-priority conflicts first.
Use one-project scope before cross-project habits.
Template-based action log entries.
success_metrics: All alias conflicts resolved or reassigned.
Action log updated for each change.
No broken references in practice plans/reports.
